title: Utility stubs — logger, unicode, sys, gleam_stdlib identity
purpose: gleam_otp actor and supervisor import utility functions from OTP modules. Implement as native Rust stubs.
task: Implement logger:warning/2, unicode:characters_to_list/1, unicode:characters_to_binary/1, sys:debug_options/1, gleam_stdlib:identity/1 in stdlib_stubs.rs.
boundaries: Only functions imported by gleam_otp — not full modules
sys:debug_options returns empty list (no OTP debug tracing)
SHALL NOT implement io:format or io:fwrite

requirements.title: logger:warning/2 and gleam_stdlib:identity/1
requirements.spec: logger:warning/2 writes warning to stderr. gleam_stdlib:identity/1 returns its argument unchanged.
acceptance: logger:warning with bad format is no-op

requirements.title: unicode conversions
requirements.spec: unicode:characters_to_list/1 and characters_to_binary/1 handle UTF-8 conversion. Binary passthrough for already-UTF-8 content.

requirements.title: sys:debug_options/1
requirements.spec: sys:debug_options/1 returns empty list (no-op stub for OTP debug tracing).
acceptance: All utility stubs registered under OTP module names
